completed_tasks.name: Extract PlaylistGenerator interface, expand PlaylistViewModel, add PlaylistViewModelTest
Create PlaylistScreen composable and wire into MainActivity
Verify end-to-end playlist generation on device
completed_tasks.progress: Tested on Pixel 8a - 16. UI states work correctly. AliMusings playlist created (empty) on YouTube Music. Two bugs found: (1) 'No internet connection' misclassification — FIXED (uncommitted), (2) YouTube quota exhausted — external blocker.

remaining_tasks.name: Re-test after quota reset and approve Phase 4 checkpoint

blockers.description: YouTube Data API daily quota exhausted during UAT (two generation runs burned ~9,850+ units each)
blockers.workaround: Wait for quota reset (midnight Pacific). Check https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/api/youtube.googleapis.com/quotas

human_actions_pending.action: Commit the three debug-fixed files, then after quota resets run ./gradlew :app:installDebug and tap Generate Playlist
human_actions_pending.context: Files modified but uncommitted: AuthRepositoryImpl.kt (Dispatchers.Main fix for AppAuth Looper crash), YouTubeRepositoryImpl.kt (deletePlaylist now propagates 401/403), REQUIREMENTS.md. Debug session: .planning/debug/no-internet-misclassification.md

human_actions_pending.action: After successful generation (AliMusings populated with songs), type 'confirmed fixed' to close debug session and Phase 4 checkpoint
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 4 completes after checkpoint approval -> phase verifier runs -> ROADMAP advances to Phase 5

decisions.decision: Fix AuthRepositoryImpl.refreshAccessToken() with withContext(Dispatchers.Main) for AppAuth performTokenRequest
decisions.rationale: AppAuth creates an Android Handler internally requiring a Looper. OkHttp interceptor threads have no Looper, causing RuntimeException wrapped as IOException, misclassified as NetworkError ('No internet connection').

decisions.decision: Fix YouTubeRepositoryImpl.deletePlaylist() to only swallow 404, not all exceptions via runCatching
decisions.rationale: Original runCatching silently hid 403/401 errors from deletePlaylist. Now only 404 (playlist already gone) is suppressed; quota/auth errors propagate correctly.

next_action: Commit debug fixes: `git add app/src/main/java/com/musicali/app/auth/AuthRepositoryImpl.kt app/src/main/java/com/musicali/app/data/remote/youtube/YouTubeRepositoryImpl.kt && git add -f .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md && git commit -m 'fix(04): use Dispatchers.Main for AppAuth token refresh, propagate 401/403 from deletePlaylist'`. Then wait for YouTube quota reset (midnight Pacific) and re-test.
context_notes: Phase 4 UI is functionally complete. All 4 UI states (Idle, Generating, Success, Error) render correctly with correct messages and action buttons. The only issue was the auth/Looper bug causing 'No internet connection' when token expired mid-pipeline. Fix is ready but uncommitted. After quota reset and re-test, approve checkpoint -> phase verifier -> Phase 5 (polish/cache).
